name: tvQuran
description: Browse tvQuran.com Quran selections, category/collection playlists, reciter channels, direct MP3 audio, and nested YouTube video/live content.
author: yshalsager

settings.name: Site Language
settings.description: Language used for tvQuran pages, reciter names, category names, and item titles.

settings.name: Home Page
settings.description: Choose what the tvQuran home tab shows.

settings.name: Home Category
settings.description: Choose which tvQuran category appears on the home tab.

settings.name: Home Sort
settings.description: Choose how tvQuran category selections are sorted on the home tab.

settings.name: Sort Direction
settings.description: Choose whether tvQuran category pages are loaded newest/highest first or oldest/lowest first.

settings.name: Reciter Sort
settings.description: Choose how reciter channel browsing is sorted when no reciter search text is entered.

1: Initial tvQuran category selections, category/collection playlists, Arabic/English/German site language support, reciter channels, moshaf/collection metadata, direct MP3 playback, reciter recitations home mode, nested YouTube video/live/prayer-recitation content, selection sorting and sort direction, direct collection URL support, paginated search, reciter/surah/category search filters, paged channel search, channel peeks, richer suggestions, audio/video recommendations, richer category/video channel metadata, bounded caches, and config-relative fallback thumbnail support.
